content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于1月28日19:10(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年2月11日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、战斗
【唤醒体加强】
● 徐
    ○ 超限爆发「孽海葬情」：
        ■ 选择「相许」时的效果调整为造成的「中毒」和「痴醉」变为 3 倍。
        ■ 选择「夺魄」时的效果每移除 1 层「痴醉」积攒的猩红熔炉由 15% 提高为 20% 体质。
 
【优化与改善】
● 优化了唤醒体「徐」的指令卡触发「共振」效果时的结算方式：若本张指令卡同时触发了「下张指令卡生效 2 次」类效果，则「共振」效果也会生效 2 次。
● 优化了唤醒体「徐」自动战斗的出牌顺序。现在会优先在能够触发「共振」效果时打出「徐」的指令卡。
● 为避免歧义，调整了症状卡「多疑」的效果判定时机。新效果为：回合结束时，若此卡牌仍在手中且本回合打出的卡牌不多于 3 张，下回合额外获得 2 点算力。
● 为避免歧义，调整了症状卡「兴奋」的效果判定时机。新效果为：回合结束时，若此卡牌仍在手中且本回合剩余的算力不少于 2 点，下回合额外抽 2 张牌。
● 优化了症状卡「盲从」的效果描述，明确了触发时机为回合结束时在手牌中，使其更加清晰规范。
● 为唤醒体「哈姆林」添加了「蓄势乐音」、「上行音」、「下行音」词缀说明。
 
二、问题修复
【一般】
● 修复了在查看「排行榜」中的「调查数据」以及有助战唤醒体的「调查数据」时，密契完成度会错误地显示为 0 的问题。
● 修复了在查看其他守密人的「守密人档案」时，若对方助战唤醒体己方未获得，启灵等级没有正常显示的问题。
 
【战斗】
● 修复了使用「超维」界域进行战斗时，战斗内点击超维空间时「超维」界域的描述错误，现在修复为和实际逻辑一致。
● 修复了手牌中拥有多张症状卡「兴奋」/「多疑」时，其效果仅能触发 1 次的问题。
● 调整了状态「中毒」、「出血」、「献祭」的结算时机。现在它们会在「回合结束获得护盾 / 生命回复」相关效果结算后再进行结算。
● 调整了命轮「引舵之帆」的状态显示效果，现在会显示即将获取的已损生命治疗比例。
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」的技能「追忆回旋曲」在拥有「繁育刻印」时，打出后获得的卡牌在算力不足时，未显示算力不足的卡牌特效的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「诺缔拉」在一回合内连续释放 2 次狂气爆发时，施加的「祝福」效果仅持续 1 回合的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「克莱门汀」移除敌人的「永久疯狂」状态后，无论敌人当前拥有多少层「永久疯狂」，下回合都只会重新获得 1 层「永久疯狂」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「血链 · 希洛」使用即将变化为「嗜血链球」（3/3）的「鲜血链条」时，若此卡牌进入了超维空间，错误置入了卡牌「嗜血链球」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「血链 · 希洛」使用「嗜血链球」时，若此卡牌进入了超维空间，错误置入了卡牌「鲜血链条」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「凯刻斯」启灵3「不被接纳之痛」生命回复错误为 1 的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「茉夏」错误的具备「主宰」标签的问题。
● 修复了装备命轮「引舵之帆」的唤醒体单回合连续释放 2 次狂气爆发时，仅能施加 1 次延迟治疗效果的问题。
● 修复了忘却篇造物「虫群意识」因触腕伤害 / 被动伤害导致怪物死亡时，不会清除「出血」状态的问题。
● 修复了敌人「反叛宿命之子」第四个意图护盾获取量面板显示为 1 ，且不会实际获得任何护盾的问题。
● 修复了敌人「猩红」的「血之狂暴」状态层数上限始终为 1，致使承受任何数额的伤害都会立即切换至「血与沙之歌」的问题。
● 修复了敌人「渴血患者」的状态「血之屏障」层数上限为 1 的问题。
● 修复了敌人「梭行维度之犬」、「刻耳柏洛斯」的状态「维度壁障」层数上限为 1 的问题。
● 修复了敌人「利莫里亚的希望！」的状态「神降畸变」：登场时使其它友方获得力量效果，数值仅为 1 点的问题。
● 修复了敌人「遇难探险队」、「探险者领队」的状态「冰之锋刃」：回合结束时根据手牌数获得力量效果，数值仅为 1 点的问题。
● 修复了敌人「雪山之蛹」、「雪之祭品」的状态「霜返」：累计受到 X 次主动伤害后冻结手牌中 1 张指令卡，承受 1 次伤害便会施加冻结效果的问题，正确效果应为承受 5 次伤害后便会再次施加。
● 修复了敌人「雪山之蛹」、「雪之祭品」的状态「霜返」：累计受到 X 次主动伤害后冻结手牌中 1 张指令卡，触发 2 次后便会永久失效的问题，正确效果应为状态效果持续存在，但每次触发后重置计数。
● 修复了敌人「美德骑士」的状态「骑士的信仰」每回合首次被击破护盾时，下回合开始时获得的护盾数额仅为 1 的问题。
 
【语言】
● 修复了英语、俄语、韩语语言设置下，部分文本错误显示为中文的问题。德语、法语、西班牙语、葡萄牙语、越南语、泰语、印尼语言设置下，可能仍然存在错误显示为中文的文本，我们将在未来的更新中尽快修复。

**V2.4.2.1 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on January 28 at 19:10(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on February 11, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Battle
[Awakener Enhancement]
● Xu
  ○ Over-Exaltation "Karmic Grave":
        ■ The effect when choosing "Betroth" is adjusted to triple the inflicted "Poison" and "Spellbound".
        ■ When choosing "Enthrall," the effect of accumulating Crimson Furnace for each stack of "Spellbound" removed increases from 15% to 20% CON.

[Optimizations and Improvements]
● Optimized the resolution method for the "Resonance" effect triggered by the Awakener "Xu's" Command Card: If this Command Card simultaneously triggers effects such as "The next Command Card will take effect twice," the "Resonance" effect will also take effect twice.
● Optimized the play order of the Awakener "Xu" in Auto Battle. Now, it will prioritize playing "Xu's" Command Cards when it can trigger the "Resonance" effect.
● To avoid ambiguity, the timing for the effect judgment of the Symptom Card "Suspicion" has been adjusted. The new effect is: At the end of the turn, if this card is still in hand and no more than 3 cards are played this turn, gain 2 extra Arithmetica next turn.
● To avoid ambiguity, the timing of the effect determination for the Symptom Card "Elation" has been adjusted. The new effect is: At the end of the turn, if this card is still in hand and the remaining Arithmetica this turn is 2 or more, draw 2 additional cards next turn.
● Optimized the effect description of the Symptom Card "Obedience," clarifying that the trigger timing is at the end of the turn while in hand, making it clearer and more standardized.
● Added affix descriptions for the Awakener "Hameln": "Crescendo," "Ascending Scale," and "Descending Scale."

2. Problem Fix
[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the Covenant Completion was incorrectly displayed as 0 when viewing the investigation data in the "Leaderboard" and the investigation data with assisting Awakeners.
● Fixed the issue where the Enlighten Level did not display correctly when viewing other Keepers' "Keeper's Archives" if the opponent's Awakeners were not obtained by the player.

[Battle]
● Fixed the description error of the "Ultra" Realm when clicking on Ultra Space during combat using the "Ultra" Realm. It has now been corrected to align with the actual logic.
● Fixed the issue where the effects of having multiple Symptom Cards "Elation"/"Suspicion" in hand could only be triggered once.
● Adjusted the timing of the states "Poison," "Bleed," and "Sacrifice." They will now be resolved after the resolution of effects related to "gaining Shield / HP Recovery" at the end of the turn.
● Adjusted the status display effect of the Wheel of Destiny "Sail of Providence"; it now shows the healing ratio of lost HP that will be gained.
● Fixed an issue where the skill "Memory Rondo" of the Awakener "Hameln" did not display the Arithmetica insufficiency effect on cards obtained after being played when having the "Breeding Orison".
● Fixed the issue where the "Blessing" effect applied by the Awakener "Nautila" only lasted for 1 turn when using Exalt twice in a single turn.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Clementine" removes the enemy's "Permanent Madness" state, and regardless of how many stacks of "Permanent Madness" the enemy currently has, they would only regain 1 stack of "Permanent Madness" in the next turn.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Helot: Catena" incorrectly placed the card "Bloodthirsty Flail" when using the "Crimson Shackles" that was about to change to "Bloodthirsty Flail" (3/3) if this card entered Ultra Space.
● Fixed the issue where using the "Bloodthirsty Flail" with the Awakener "Helot: Catena" incorrectly placed the card "Crimson Shackles" when this card entered Ultra Space.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Caecus" Enlighten 3 "Outcast's Anguish" had an incorrect HP recovery of 1.
● Fixed the issue where Awakener "Mouchette" incorrectly had the "Dominion" tag.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener equipped with the Wheel of Destiny "Sail of Providence" could only apply the Delayed Healing effect once when unleashing Exalt twice in a single turn.

● Fixed the issue where the Faded Legacy relic "Swarm Mind" would not clear the "Bleed" state when a monster died due to Tentacle DMG / passive DMG.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Rebel Child of Fate" displayed a Shield gain of 1 for the fourth intention but did not actually receive any Shield.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Crimson" had a maximum stack limit of 1 for the "Blood Frenzy" state, causing it to switch to "Song of Blood and Sand" immediately upon taking any amount of DMG.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Sanguivore Patient" had a maximum of 1 stack for the state "Blood Barrier."
● Fixed the enemy "Dimensional Hounds" and "Cerberus" state issue where the "Dimensional Barrier" stacks limit was set to 1.
● Fixed the enemy "The Hope of Lemuria!" state "Divine Mutation": Upon entering the field, it grants other allies a Strength effect, with a value of only 1 point.
● Fixed the enemy "Stranded Exploration Team" and "Expedition Leader" state "Blade of Ice": The effect of gaining Strength at turn end based on the number of cards in hand was incorrectly set to only 1 point.
● Fixed the enemy states "Snow Mountain's Cocoon" and "Snow Offering" regarding the "Frost Return" state: The issue where after receiving X instances of Active DMG, it would freeze 1 Command Card in hand after taking 1 instance of DMG, the correct effect should apply again after taking 5 instances of DMG.
● Fixed the issue with the enemies "Snow Mountain's Cocoon" and "Snow Offering" having the state "Frost Return": After receiving X instances of Active DMG, freeze 1 Command Card in hand. The correct effect should be that the state effect continues to exist, but the count resets after each trigger.
● Fixed the enemy "Virtue Knight" issue where the Shield amount gained at the start of next turn after the first break of the state "Knight's Faith" each round was only 1.

[Language]
● Fixed the issue where certain texts were incorrectly displayed in Chinese under English, Russian, and Korean language settings. There may still be texts incorrectly displayed in Chinese under German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Vietnamese, Thai, and Indonesian language settings, and we will address these issues in future updates as soon as possible.
